languages.text: {n}Ваши соратники согласно шумят в ответ на ваши слова. Инквизитор молча переводит взгляд на {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}сестер Битвы{/g}. Они стоят, как вырезанные из камня, — и все же в этой неподвижности нет покоя. Болтеры подняты ровно настолько, чтобы одним движением взять цель.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ваши соратники согласно шумят в ответ на ваши слова. Инквизитор молча переводит взгляд на {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}сестер Битвы{/g}. Они стоят, как вырезанные из камня, — и все же в этой неподвижности нет покоя. Болтеры подняты ровно настолько, чтобы одним движением взять цель.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Your companions murmur in agreement in response to your words. The Inquisitor silently turns his gaze to the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}. They stand as if carved from stone — and yet there is no peace in that stillness. Their bolters are raised just enough to take aim in a single motion.{/n}

They stand as if carved from stone — and yet there is no peace in that stillness. Their bolters are raised just enough to take aim in a single motion.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的同伴们低声附和着你的话。审判官默默将目光转向{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}战斗修女{/g}。她们如石雕般纹丝不动，然而那宁静之中毫无安宁。她们的爆矢枪已微微抬起，只消一个动作便能瞄准目标。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companions murmur in agreement in response to your words. The Inquisitor silently turns his gaze to the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}. They stand as if carved from stone — and yet there is no peace in that stillness. Their bolters are raised just enough to take aim in a single motion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的同伴们低声附和着你的话。审判官默默将目光转向{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}战斗修女{/g}。她们如石雕般纹丝不动，然而那宁静之中毫无安宁。她们的爆矢枪已微微抬起，只消一个动作便能瞄准目标。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vos compagnons murmurent leur approbation. Sans dire un mot, l'inquisiteur se tourne vers les {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sœurs de Bataille{/g}. Si elles se tiennent immobiles comme autant de statues de marbre, leur posture exprime tout sauf la paix. Leurs bolters sont levés juste ce qu'il faut pour leur permettre de viser d'un seul geste.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companions murmur in agreement in response to your words. The Inquisitor silently turns his gaze to the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}. They stand as if carved from stone — and yet there is no peace in that stillness. Their bolters are raised just enough to take aim in a single motion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vos compagnons murmurent leur approbation. Sans dire un mot, l'inquisiteur se tourne vers les {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sœurs de Bataille{/g}. Si elles se tiennent immobiles comme autant de statues de marbre, leur posture exprime tout sauf la paix. Leurs bolters sont levés juste ce qu'il faut pour leur permettre de viser d'un seul geste.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yoldaşların, sözlerini mırıltılarla onaylıyor. Engizisyoncu sessizce bakışlarını {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Harp Rahibeleri'ne{/g} çeviriyor. Taştan oyulmuş gibi duruyorlar ancak bu durgunlukları barış hissinden yoksun. Bulonatarları, tek bir hareketle nişan alacak kadar havaya kalkmış vaziyette bekliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companions murmur in agreement in response to your words. The Inquisitor silently turns his gaze to the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}. They stand as if carved from stone — and yet there is no peace in that stillness. Their bolters are raised just enough to take aim in a single motion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yoldaşların, sözlerini mırıltılarla onaylıyor. Engizisyoncu sessizce bakışlarını {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Harp Rahibeleri'ne{/g} çeviriyor. Taştan oyulmuş gibi duruyorlar ancak bu durgunlukları barış hissinden yoksun. Bulonatarları, tek bir hareketle nişan alacak kadar havaya kalkmış vaziyette bekliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus compañeros murmuran su aprobación ante tus palabras. El Inquisidor, sin decir palabra, vuelve la mirada a las {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Hermanas de Batalla{/g}. Se mantienen firmes, como si fueran de piedra, pero no hay paz alguna en su inmutabilidad. Sus bólters están alzados exactamente a la altura justa para apuntar con un solo movimiento.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companions murmur in agreement in response to your words. The Inquisitor silently turns his gaze to the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}. They stand as if carved from stone — and yet there is no peace in that stillness. Their bolters are raised just enough to take aim in a single motion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus compañeros murmuran su aprobación ante tus palabras. El Inquisidor, sin decir palabra, vuelve la mirada a las {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Hermanas de Batalla{/g}. Se mantienen firmes, como si fueran de piedra, pero no hay paz alguna en su inmutabilidad. Sus bólters están alzados exactamente a la altura justa para apuntar con un solo movimiento.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Gefährten stimmen deiner Antwort murmelnd zu. Der Inquisitor wendet seinen Blick lautlos den {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sororitas{/g} zu. Sie stehen da wie zu Stein erstarrt ... und doch birgt diese Stille keinen Frieden. Sie halten ihre Bolter gerade hoch genug, um mit einer einzigen Bewegung anlegen zu können.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companions murmur in agreement in response to your words. The Inquisitor silently turns his gaze to the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}. They stand as if carved from stone — and yet there is no peace in that stillness. Their bolters are raised just enough to take aim in a single motion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Gefährten stimmen deiner Antwort murmelnd zu. Der Inquisitor wendet seinen Blick lautlos den {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sororitas{/g} zu. Sie stehen da wie zu Stein erstarrt ... und doch birgt diese Stille keinen Frieden. Sie halten ihre Bolter gerade hoch genug, um mit einer einzigen Bewegung anlegen zu können.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの言葉に、仲間たちは同意を込めてささやき合う。インキジターは静かに視線を{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}バトルシスターズ{/g}に向ける。彼女たちはまるで石で彫られたかのように立ち尽くしているが、その静けさの中に平和はなかった。ボルトガンはわずかに持ち上げられ、一挙に狙いを定めている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companions murmur in agreement in response to your words. The Inquisitor silently turns his gaze to the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}. They stand as if carved from stone — and yet there is no peace in that stillness. Their bolters are raised just enough to take aim in a single motion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの言葉に、仲間たちは同意を込めてささやき合う。インキジターは静かに視線を{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}バトルシスターズ{/g}に向ける。彼女たちはまるで石で彫られたかのように立ち尽くしているが、その静けさの中に平和はなかった。ボルトガンはわずかに持ち上げられ、一挙に狙いを定めている。{/n}
